metadata.description: AI image generation for Claude Code — prefers AI Studio free tier, falls back to Vertex AI on quota. Supports Nano Banana, Imagen 4, and OpenAI gpt-image-1. Includes --json, --output-dir, stdin, and multimodal/image-only overrides.

plugins.name: ai-image
plugins.description: Image generation skill that wraps the `ai-image` CLI. Prefers AI Studio free tier (GEMINI_API_KEY) and falls back to Vertex AI on quota/rate-limit errors. Supports --json, --output-dir, stdin prompts, and --multimodal/--image-only overrides. Requires the CLI to be installed separately (see README).
